creator: mezz.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
I have tried to reproduce your problem today by set my system to
es_ES.UTF-8 and I can't reproduce your problem. What's version of
inkscape do you have? Are all of your installed ports up to date?
Which lang did you used?

Cheers,
Mezz
